creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
It's strange; it had already built successfully for me on 14-CURRENT i386, and I just built it successfully on 12.3-RELEASE-p6 i386 too.

What would be the difference in environments? I'm building in a VM, not a jail, so it's a 'native' i386 machine, and I installed all dependencies as packages, but I'm building qemu from the ports tree.
